title: Beloved Fumos
description:
Ever wanted to adventure with your beloved Fumos?
Well now you can! ᗜˬᗜ
body:
Mod requires Geckolib to use.


This mod adds Fumo plushies and companions to the game.
Each plush is craftable, and each companions spawn can also be crafted.



Currently, Fumos included are:  
- Reimu  
- Marisa  
- Cirno  
- Flandere 
- Ran  




Feed Fumo cookie and apple to befriend and restore health.
Please take care of your Fumos.

Right click Fumo with sword to give them a copy of the weapon, it costs 100 durability to do so. Doing this will improve the Fumos combat effectiveness unless they are Marisa, who prefers to use her magic instead. Every Touhou Fumo has a unique Fumo personality.

ᗜˬᗜ
